candidates.why: This is presented as a component within the selected COGS bucket ('Cost of revenues/COGS' / 'Production costs'), so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Production costs
candidates.why: This is a sub-component of the selected COGS total, not a separate same-level operating line to add later.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Right-of-Use Assets in Production costs
candidates.why: This appears nested within Production costs / COGS and therefore already embedded in the selected COGS row.
This looks like a label/header without values, and in any case would refer to D&A within COGS rather than a separate add-on line.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is [Income Statement] Cost of revenues/COGS. The visible COGS-related D&A rows are clearly components beneath that total, so no separate COGS D&A row should be added.

candidates.why: Presented as a component under the selected parent row 'Distribution costs', so it is already embedded in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Distribution costs
candidates.why: A sub-component of the selected distribution expense total; adding separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Right-of-Use Assets in Distribution costs
candidates.why: Nested within the selected distribution costs total and therefore already included.
Presented beneath the selected parent row 'Administrative expenses', indicating it is already embedded.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Administrative expenses
candidates.why: A component of the selected administrative expense total, not a separate same-level line.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Right-of-Use Assets in Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This appears as a subcomponent within administrative expenses and should not be added separately.

This is a component under the selected 'Research and development costs' row. Since R&D is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, adding R&D D&A separately would distort the intended XSGA minus XRD treatment.
This is a sub-component of the visible selected R&D row, which is already handled through both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so it should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS reference bucket consists of Distribution costs, Administrative expenses, Research and development costs, and Other operating expenses. All visible SG&A/R&D-related D&A rows are clearly nested beneath those selected totals. Per the R&D interaction rule, because 'Research and development costs' is explicitly present above EBIT and already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, R&D D&A should not be added separately.
